query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "alayaworld: long-horizon and playable video world generation" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review as it addresses the core domain of "video world models" and specifically tackles the "long-horizon" and "physical consistency" challenges central to the user's query about extending AlayaWorld, satisfying criteria (a) for same-mechanism evidence (geometric grounding in video generation) and (b) for measuring the same dependent variables (video prediction and physical consistency) in the same domain.
